ALIYUN::Resource::Data::API.description: Queries data from Alibaba Cloud product OpenAPI based on parameters.

APIAction.description: The cloud product and API information.

OptionsGetter.description: Defines the data hierarchy parsing mode.

ValueGetter.description: Defines the name of the attribute to parse.

LabelGetter.description: Defines the attribute displayed in the query results.

Auto.description: ROS automatically generates AssociationProperty and AssociationPropertyMetadata fields based on the Terraform original data structure. Only applies to JSON-type parameters in Terraform templates.

Overwrite.description: Supplements or overwrites nested parameter definitions. Dictionary type.

CharacterClasses.description: List of character types, each containing Class (lowercase/uppercase/number/specialCharacter), Min, etc.

ChargeType.description: The billing method. Values: PayAsYouGo, Subscription.

Cron.description: A cron expression string that specifies the execution time of a scheduled task.

FileContent.description: Reads content from a local file.

AcceptFileSuffixes.description: Accepted file types for upload. Multiple types are separated by commas.

List[Parameter].description: Parameter list with indented layout. Only applies to Json-type parameters.

Mode.description: Display style. Collapse: collapsed style (default). Table: table style.

List[Parameters].description: Parameter group list with table layout. Only applies to Json-type parameters.

Parameters.description: Dictionary type, required. Represents a group of parameter definitions. Key: parameter name. Value: parameter definition.

ListMetadata.description: Dictionary type for controlling table display, including ShowHeader, ShowRemove, ShowAddition, Order, etc.

RegionId.description: The region ID (defaults to the region of the stack).
The region ID (defaults to the region of the stack).

ResourceType.description: The resource type for tag statistics. Default: ALIYUN::ECS::INSTANCE.

Targets.description: ECS instance targets. Supports selecting instances by instance ID, tags, or resource groups.

RegionId.description: The region ID (defaults to the region of the stack).

Mode.description: The component display mode. Values: normal, dragger (default).

RegionId.description: The region of the bucket. Defaults to the current environment region.

Multiple.description: Whether to upload multiple files at once. Value: true.

Directory.description: Whether to support folder upload. Value: true.

ValueType.description: The return value type. Default: OSS Url.

AddSuffix.description: Whether to append a timestamp suffix to the file name. Value: true.

SuffixFormat.description: The timestamp suffix format, e.g. YYYY-MM-DD.

RegionId.description: The region ID (defaults to the region of the stack).

Status.description: The namespace status. Values: NORMAL, DELETING.
